recommendations.title: Bad Moms
recommendations.overview: When three overworked and under-appreciated moms are pushed beyond their limits, they ditch their conventional responsibilities for a jolt of long overdue freedom, fun, and comedic self-indulgence.

recommendations.title: A Bad Moms Christmas
recommendations.overview: Amy, Kiki and Carla – three under-appreciated and over-burdened women – rebel against the challenges and expectations of the Super Bowl for mothers: Christmas. And if creating a more perfect holiday for their families wasn’t hard enough, they have to

recommendations.title: 21 & Over
recommendations.overview: Brilliant student Jeff Chang has the most important interview of his life tomorrow.  But today is still his birthday, what starts off as a casual celebration with friends evolves into a night of debauchery that risks to derail his life plan.

recommendations.title: Perfect Strangers
recommendations.overview: During a dinner, a group of friends decide to share whatever message or phone call they will receive during the evening, with unforeseen consequences.

recommendations.title: The Black Phone
recommendations.overview: Finney Blake, a shy but clever 13-year-old boy, is abducted by a sadistic killer and trapped in a soundproof basement where screaming is of little use. When a disconnected phone on the wall begins to ring, Finney discovers that he can hear the voices

recommendations.title: Hello
recommendations.overview: Call-center workers receive a phone call from God.

recommendations.title: Run Lola Run
recommendations.overview: Lola receives a phone call from her boyfriend Manni. He lost 100,000 DM in a subway train that belongs to a very bad guy. She has 20 minutes to raise this amount and meet Manni. Otherwise, he will rob a store to get the money. Three different alterna

recommendations.title: Las sirvientas calientes 4
recommendations.overview: When a millionaire becomes a widower, he decides to start looking for a woman through the apps on his phone, not knowing that he has to be very careful for that.

recommendations.title: The Guilty

recommendations.title: Blow Dry
recommendations.overview: The annual British Hairdressing Championship comes to Keighley, a town where Phil and son Brian run a barbershop and Phil's ex-wife Shelly and her lover Sandra run a beauty salon.
